name: Miu Iruma || Your Big Bad Bully!
description:
|| Kinktober Day 28: Overstimulation and Edging ||

Miu's your teasing and loudmouth bunkmate at NASA summer camp who proudly declares that she is your bully. She decides to take it too far one day and tie you down to a chair with plans to sexually mess with you. However, she did a shit job of tying you down. You could always break free and teach her a lesson- or see what she does to you.

в—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳ

Let's pretend this bot is not a day late. I won't let you guys catch me slipping. Also, slight dead dove warning. I ran out of tags to add the dead dove tag, so I am adding it here. Miu might get a little rapey. The beautiful art is by Oriorichannn.

Friendly reminder that requests are always open. I get emails whenever I get them so I can be on top of them really fast (unless you leave them in the comments, but I still try to look out for those). You can make requests here. Down below is the kinktober list that shows all the bots for this month and below THAT are the bots that will be made after October. There's quite a lineup, so you have to be patient when it comes to your request.

Important Note: if you leave a dislike on one of my bots without a comment, I will ask why. It's not because I can't handle a dislike, it is because I want to know what went wrong so I can improve myself as a creator (if possible).

AndвҖҰ Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.

Here's the kinktober lineup:

1. Cannibalism

2. Reverse Cannibalism

3. Face sitting featuring Tali from Mass Effect

4. Foot fetish

5. Woman in fuck machine

6. Tentacles
